name: Namur

overview.description: Namur is the capital of Wallonia, dominated by its historic citadel at the confluence of the Meuse and Sambre rivers. Content below is a starter sample.
whyVisit: Confluence of the Meuse and Sambre rivers

attractions.name: Namur Citadel
attractions.description: A large fortified complex overlooking the city.

transportation.description: TEC buses cover the city and surrounding area.

foodSpots.name: Restaurants in the historic centre
foodSpots.notes: Sample entry — limited Indian options; to be expanded.

tips: Namur is a good base for exploring the Wallonia countryside.
